Ntc Of Petition And Petition For Stay Of Proceedings And To Compel Cotractual Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANTS HOLLIS PHILLIPS AND WHITNEY MISKELL'S Petition For Stay Of Proceedings And To Compel Contractual Arbitration IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
